title: Root Cause Analysis Report
description: Advisory RCA report (analysis only, never execution). Replaces legacy root-cause-summary.schema.json with enhanced structured fields for comprehensive failure analysis.

category.description: Structured failure classification for machine-readable analysis

confidence.description: Confidence level of the RCA analysis (0.0 to 1.0)

isFlaky.description: Whether the failure is identified as flaky/intermittent

detectedIssue.description: Concise statement of the detected issue

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations for fixing the issue (aliases suggestedActions from legacy schema)

affectedTests.description: List of test identifiers affected by this root cause

evidence.description: Supporting evidence for the RCA (logs, screenshots, traces, etc.)
